title: Gantt View - I need to edit the default quarters at the top of the Gantt view because our fiscal year is different than the calendar year #board-views #submit-an-idea

posts.author: EWise (Emily Wise)
posts.cookedHtml: image757×127 5.86 KB

posts.author: gvanderwerken (Gerrit Jan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was excited to see that this was released earlier this year since our fiscal year starts in Feb. BUT our convention (which I believe is the common convention) is to call the fiscal year by the year it ends (Jan in our example).
The way Monday has implemented this is not following that convention. I.e. we call May 2024: “May FY2025” but Monday calls it “May FY2024”

posts.author: ADee (Andrea Dee)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I am having the same issue!
